--- subsys/net/ip/net_timeout.c
+++ subsys/net/ip/net_timeout.c
@@ -44,7 +44,15 @@
 int64_t net_timeout_deadline(const struct net_timeout *timeout,
 			     int64_t now)
 {
-    /* MASKED - implement this function */
+	int64_t timer_start_64;
+
+	timer_start_64 = now + (int64_t)(int32_t)(timeout->timer_start -
+						  (uint32_t)now);
+
+	return timer_start_64 +
+	       (int64_t)timeout->timer_timeout +
+	       (int64_t)((uint64_t)timeout->wrap_counter *
+			 (uint64_t)NET_TIMEOUT_MAX_VALUE);
 }
 
 uint32_t net_timeout_remaining(const struct net_timeout *timeout,
